From our lab to yours

Ordering from GlycoTech is easy - Oder directly from us online or from one of our distributors worldwide.

Have Questions? Message Us

payment terms

ADDRESS

Shipping & Handling

shipping routes, costs & handling fees

2-days - $17.00 USD
Overnight - $30.00 USD
International - $80.00 USD
Required shipping routes may be required due to the specific requirements of each product.
Additional handling fees may apply and will be prepaid and added to invoice.

Submitting Your Order

Submit Your Order Online

You can place your order online by adding items to your cart and checking out. You can order online with a accepted credit card or a purchase order.

Place Your Order by Phone

If yiu get need assistance with our online ordering system of prefer to order by phone, give us a call and we would be happy to help!

Fax Your Purchase Order

You may also place orders by fax at 301-738-1077.
